chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1311 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5029/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 16.11.2023 Mr. Ashok Kumar K. Jamba, Advocate for petitioners. M/s Abdur Rahman Faruq Pirzada and Fareed Ahmed Soomro, Advocates for respondent No.1. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioners, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
